content.text: This is our news page, if you would like to get promoted, feel free to reach out to us by email: rutgersmobileapp@gmail.com

content.title: Twitch
content.text: One of our developers has her own Twitch channel! Please feel to check it out, her Twitch name is XuTheBunno. She streams on Tuesday and Thursday at 10:30pm

content.title: What’s New
content.text:
Now you can click on dining hall foods to get their:
☯︎ Calories
☯︎ Carbs, fat and protein amounts
☯︎ Portion sizes
☯︎ Daily value breakdowns
☯︎ Ingredients
Happy eating!

content.title: Contribute
content.text: Want to get involved? Email us at rutgersmobileapp@gmail.com. Please include a short description of your work and your resume. We can’t wait to see what you have to offer!

content.title: Feedback
content.text: Have questions, comments, concerns? Let us know by sending us an email. If you love our app, please leave us a review!

content.title: Want to Get Featured?
content.text: Send your epic quotes, ideas, and content to feature on the Message of the Day screen to our email, rutgersmobileapp@gmail.com
